name: remote-latexmk
description: Compile LaTeX projects on a private remote TeX Live server.

interface.shortDescription: Compile LaTeX on your private TeX server
interface.longDescription: Preview dependency-aware uploads, compile on a self-hosted TeX Live server, inspect diagnostics, and download artifacts without local TeX Live.
defaultPrompt: Check my saved Remote LaTeX login for this workspace.
Preview and compile this LaTeX project.
Install or troubleshoot my private Remote LaTeX server.
